beIN SPORTS 5.desc: تتجه بطولة التحمل العالمية التي ينظمها الاتحاد الدولي للسيارات إلى حلبة لا سارث الشهيرة للمشاركة في سباق لومان 24 ساعة لعام 2026، وهو الاختبار النهائي للقدرة على التحمل والسرعة والموثوقية.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Course - Séance 8 - Championnat du Monde d'Endurance FIA ​​2026 - 24H du Mans
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: The FIA World Endurance Championship heads to the iconic Circuit de la Sarthe for the 2026 24 Hours of Le Mans, the ultimate test of endurance, speed and reliability. Across day and night, the world’s leading teams and manufacturers battle through traffic, strategy calls and changing conditions in one of motorsport’s most prestigious races.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Le Championnat du Monde d'Endurance de la FIA se dirige vers l'emblématique Circuit de la Sarthe pour les 24 Heures du Mans 2026, le test ultime d'endurance, de vitesse et de fiabilité.

The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. 
Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking.
All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Morocco vs Egypt - CAF  U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 -Third Place
beIN SPORTS 5.title: المغرب vs مصر - CAF كأس الأمم الأفريقية تحت 17 سنة المغرب 2026 -المركز الثالث
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: كأس الأمم الأفريقية تحت 17 سنة هي بطولة كرة القدم الأفريقية السنوية للشباب التي ينظمها الاتحاد الأفريقي لكرة القدم (CAF) للاعبين الذين تبلغ أعمارهم 17 عامًا أو أقل.
beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Maroc vs Egypte - Coupe d'Afrique des Nations U17 de la CAF Maroc 2026 - Troisième place
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: La Coupe d'Afrique des Nations U17 de la CAF est le tournoi annuel de football des jeunes africains organisé par la Confédération africaine de football (CAF) pour les joueurs âgés de 17 ans et moins.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: ATP 500 HSBC Championships 2026 returns to the historic Queen’s Club in London, one of the oldest and most prestigious grass-court tournaments in the world. First held in 1890, the event is considered a major Wimbledon warm-up and traditionally features many of the ATP Tour’s leading players competing for a key ATP 500 title.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Les Championnats ATP 500 HSBC 2026 reviennent au Queen’s Club historique de Londres, l’un des tournois sur gazon les plus anciens et les plus prestigieux au monde.

beIN SPORTS 9.desc: يعود سباق جائزة صاحب السمو الأمير الوالد 2026 في الفترة من 9 إلى 10 يناير 2026، ليجمع بين سباقات الخيول الأصيلة من الدرجة الأولى على مدار يومين من الإثارة التنافسية، ويضم تشكيلة دولية قوية، ومسابقات عالية المخاطر، وأجواء متميزة تحتفي برياضة النخبة، والتقاليد، والمكانة في تقويم السباقات في قطر.
beIN SPORTS 9.title_fr: Prix ​​S.A. le Père Amirs 2026 - Semaine 3 - Promotion 48
beIN SPORTS 9.desc_en: H.H. the Father Amir’s Prix 2026 returns on 9–10 January 2026, bringing together top-class Thoroughbred racing across two days of competitive action, featuring a strong international line-up, high-stakes contests, and a standout atmosphere that celebrates elite sport, tradition, and prestige on Qatar’s racing calendar.
beIN SPORTS 9.desc_fr: Le Prix 2026 de S.A. le Père Amir revient les 9 et 10 janvier 2026, réunissant des courses de pur-sang de haut niveau au cours de deux jours de compétition, avec une solide programmation internationale, des compétitions à enjeux élevés et une atmosphère exceptionnelle qui célèbre le sport d'élite, la tradition et le prestige du calendrier des courses du Qatar.

beIN SPORTS 8.desc: تتجه بطولة التحمل العالمية التي ينظمها الاتحاد الدولي للسيارات إلى حلبة لا سارث الشهيرة للمشاركة في سباق لومان 24 ساعة لعام 2026، وهو الاختبار النهائي للقدرة على التحمل والسرعة والموثوقية.
beIN SPORTS 8.title_fr: Course - Séance 2 - Championnat du Monde d'Endurance FIA ​​2026 - 24H du Mans
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_en: The FIA World Endurance Championship heads to the iconic Circuit de la Sarthe for the 2026 24 Hours of Le Mans, the ultimate test of endurance, speed and reliability. Across day and night, the world’s leading teams and manufacturers battle through traffic, strategy calls and changing conditions in one of motorsport’s most prestigious races.
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_fr: Le Championnat du Monde d'Endurance de la FIA se dirige vers l'emblématique Circuit de la Sarthe pour les 24 Heures du Mans 2026, le test ultime d'endurance, de vitesse et de fiabilité.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Spain vs Cape Verde - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: إسبانيا vs الرأس الأخضر - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وسيكون هذا أول لقاء على الإطلاق بين إسبانيا وكابو فيردي.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Espagne vs Cap-Vert - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the first ever meeting between Spain and Cabo Verde. Nigeria are the only CAF team to beat Spain at the FIFA World Cup, in the group stages of the 1998 edition. Their last two encounters with African opposition were both against Morocco, with both ending in draws.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la toute première rencontre entre l'Espagne et le Cap-Vert.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Qatar vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: قطر vs سويسرا - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: سيكون هذا أول لقاء بين قطر وسويسرا في كأس العالم FIFA.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Qatar vs Suisse - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be Qatar and Switzerland’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a November 2018 friendly in Lugano – Qatar won 1-0 thanks to an Akram Afif goal. This will be Qatar’s second FIFA World Cup, but it’s the first time they had to qualify for the tournament – their previous participation in 2022 came as hosts. The
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s’agira de la première rencontre entre le Qatar et la Suisse en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Belgium vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: بلجيكا vs مصر - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: ستلتقي بلجيكا ومصر في كأس العالم FIFA للمرة الأولى.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Belgique vs Egypte - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Belgium and Egypt will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their four previous encounters were all friendlies, with Egypt winning three and Belgium one. Belgium and Egypt’s last encounter came in a November 2022 friendly – Egypt won 2-1 in Kuwait City.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: La Belgique et l'Egypte se rencontreront pour la première fois en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Sweden vs Tunisia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: السويد vs تونس - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وستكون هذه أول مواجهة في كأس العالم لكرة القدم بين السويد وتونس.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Suède vs Tunisie - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the first FIFA World Cup encounter between Sweden and Tunisia. Their four previous meetings all came in friendlies, resulting in two Sweden wins, one draw and one Tunisia victory. Their most recent clash occurred in February 2003, a 1-0 win for Tunisia in their capital Tunis. The four previous meetings between Sweden and Tunisia have o
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la première rencontre de Coupe du Monde de la FIFA entre la Suède et la Tunisie.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: السعودية vs الأوروغواي - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: تلتقي السعودية وأوروجواي في كأس العالم لكرة القدم للمرة الثانية.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Arabie Saoudite vs Uruguay - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win  and one defeat.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: L'Arabie Saoudite et l'Uruguay se rencontrent pour la deuxième fois en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: الكلمة الأخيرة
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: كل يوم خلال كأس العالم FIFA 2026™، "الكلمة الأخيرة" هو تعليق الاستوديو النهائي على أحداث المباراة خلال الـ 24 ساعة الماضية.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
Every day during the FIFA World Cup 2026™, “The Last Word” is the definitive studio comment on the match action from the previous 24 hours.
All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Chaque jour pendant la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™, « The Last Word » est le commentaire définitif du studio sur l'action du match des 24 heures précédentes.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Espagne vs Cap-Vert - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the first ever meeting between Spain and Cabo Verde. Nigeria are the only CAF team to beat Spain at the FIFA World Cup, in the group stages of the 1998 edition. Their last two encounters with African opposition were both against Morocco, with both ending in draws.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la toute première rencontre entre l'Espagne et le Cap-Vert.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: العالم اليوم
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: "العالم اليوم" هو استوديو يومي مباشر من beIN يتطلع إلى جميع مباريات كأس العالم FIFA 2026™ القادمة من الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية والمكسيك وكندا.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
“World Today” is a live daily studio from beIN looking forward to all the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™ FIFA World Cup action from USA, Mexico and Canada.
All 104 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: « World Today » est un studio quotidien en direct de beIN qui attend avec impatience toutes les prochaines actions de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™ aux États-Unis, au Mexique et au Canada.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: العد التنازلي
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: "العد التنازلي" هو استوديو تابع لـ beIN ليوم المباراة من بطولة كأس العالم لكرة القدم 2026™ ويبث مباشرة قبل استوديو ما قبل المباراة.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
“Countdown” is a beIN match day studio from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ broadcast live ahead of the pre match studio. “Countdown” covers the arrival of the players, coaching staff and fans as they experience the matchday stadium and atmosphere for the first time.
All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabi
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: « Countdown » est un studio beIN de jour de match de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™ diffusé en direct avant le studio d'avant-match.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Gérone vs Levante - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - Journée 5
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: This will be the fifth meeting between Girona and Levante in LaLiga, with both sides scoring in the previous four encounters. Girona have not won either of their two matches at the Municipal de Montilivi against Levante UD in LaLiga, only against Real Sociedad  and Villarreal  have they played more home matches without a win in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Ce sera la cinquième rencontre entre Gérone et Levante en Liga, les deux équipes ayant marqué lors des quatre rencontres précédentes.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Valence vs Athletic Club - LaLiga Espagnole 2025/26 - Journée 5
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Valencia have lost their last two LaLiga matches against Athletic Bilbao, failing to score in both. Athletic Club have won three of their last six LaLiga away matches against V
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Valence a perdu ses deux derniers matches de Liga contre l'Athletic Bilbao, sans parvenir à marquer lors des deux.
